limitation: The report is based on MarineTraffic observations relayed by a media open-source unit; it does not establish the full denominator of traffic or prove all Saudi-linked flows fell.
observation: Al Jazeera Arabic reports MarineTraffic observations of two vessels linked to Jeddah crossing Bab el-Mandeb after the embargo announcement, while two Saudi-loaded tankers reportedly turned north toward the Suez Canal.
